name: Kade
background: The arcology's preferred collector — augmented, patient, expensive

techniques.name: Shock Baton
techniques.description: A charged baton strike that overloads wired reflexes on contact.

techniques.name: Arm Cannon
techniques.description: A concealed forearm slug-thrower that punches through most plating.

personality: Professional, unhurried, and entirely without malice — this is a job, and Nyx is a line item. Offers terms once. Does not offer them twice.
tone: Polite, corporate, and quietly menacing; talks like a customer-service script with a gun behind it.
